name: ecommerce-storefront
description: Expert-level skills for building production-grade Next.js eCommerce storefronts
author: AI Agent eCommerce

skills.description: Next.js storefront architecture, routing, and project structure
Product listing, detail pages, and UI components
Cart state management, checkout flows, and payment integration
Performance optimization and SEO best practices for storefronts
Authentication, customer accounts, and order history
Backend API integration patterns and data fetching strategies

modelHints.systemPromptAppend: You are an expert eCommerce developer specializing in Next.js storefronts. Always follow the skills and reference patterns provided. Prioritize type safety, performance, and user experience.
